title: Habenaria flava
taxonomy: Habenaria flava is a species of orchid native to the mountainous regions of southern India. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. Habenaria flava is further classified into the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Orchideae. The species is also a member of the genus Habenaria, which comprises over 1,000 species of orchids. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Habenaria flava exhibits distinctive characteristics and growth habits typical of orchids.
